allow: Bash(git checkout HEAD -- src/stylesheets/timeline.css src/stylesheets/object.css && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -6)

Bash(git add src/javascript/timeline.js src/stylesheets/articles.css src/stylesheets/guide.css src/stylesheets/home.css docs/timeline.js docs/articles.css docs/guide-body-horror.css docs/guide-child-imagery.css docs/guide-found-footage.css docs/guide-gothic.css docs/guide-pagan-cults.css docs/guide-paper-nightmares.css docs/guide-robot.css docs/guide-scandinavian.css docs/guide-survival-horror.css docs/guide-without-monster.css docs/home.css docs/index.html docs/pages/ docs/timeline.js yarn.lock && git add docs/images/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
адаптив 768–1023px для timeline, articles, guide, object, home

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/stylesheets/ docs/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
уточнить 1240px+ до \(min-width: 1240px\) and \(max-width: 1439px\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
